_meta.policy: Acceptance summary only. It does not replace pytest or command execution output.

before_after_delta_matrix.changed_rows_policy: Allowed when critical acceptance deltas remain zero; review/freshness/masterfile deltas are documented in improvement_deltas.

next_review_command_safety_gate.policy: Next-review execution is blocked when any command requires manual review, and no execution plan row may authorize data changes.

policies.data/reports/b3_masterfile_gap_review.js: This review does not authorize inferred identifiers, sectors, categories, names, scope changes, or symbol changes. Every row is keyed by listing_key and tied to the B3 dataset row plus official B3 masterfile source presence. Rows absent from all current B3 masterfile sources remain source gaps until stronger official evidence exists.
policies.data/reports/b3_residual_isin_review.jso: Rows in this report remain blank in the dataset unless an official B3/CSD/fund source provides a direct valid ISIN. Every row is keyed by listing_key and tied back to source_gap_classification/source_of_truth_decisions. Official B3 sources without exposed ISIN values are review evidence only; they do not authorize inferred identifiers.
policies.data/reports/b3_residual_sector_review.j: Rows in this report remain blank unless an official B3 taxonomy or reviewed issuer source maps the exact listing to a canonical stock_sector. Every row is keyed by listing_key and tied back to source_gap_classification/source_of_truth_decisions. Alphanumeric B3 issuer-code roots are preserved for probe diagnostics; no sector is inferred from the code shape.
policies.data/reports/otc_scope_review.json: OTC listings are extended scope unless a reviewed future scope change explicitly says otherwise. OTC source gaps remain blank; sector/category fills require reviewed issuer or product evidence.
policies.data/reports/otc_name_mismatch_review.js: Review queue only. OTC names are not changed unless an official or reviewed issuer-history source matches the listing_key and required identity evidence.
policies.data/reports/canada_residual_review.json: TMX/Cboe Canada official masterfiles are used as listing evidence, but current Canada official feeds do not expose ISIN or sector values. FIGI enrichment is OpenFIGI-by-ISIN only; rows without ISIN must resolve the ISIN/source gate first. Accepted OpenFIGI no-match and cross-ISIN collision reviews are retained as source gaps, not queued again as candidates. No Canadian ISIN, FIGI, sector, or category is inferred from symbol or name shape.
policies.data/reports/canada_figi_queue.json: Only canada_residual_review rows with valid ISIN, missing FIGI, and figi_decision=missing_figi_openfigi_candidate are queued. Rows with an accepted OpenFIGI no-match or FIGI-collision review are excluded until a stronger source is available. Rows without ISIN are excluded; OpenFIGI candidate selection must still prefer the Canada exchange hint and ticker.
policies.data/reports/asx_residual_review.json: ASXListedCompanies.csv, ASX investment-products workbook, and ASX ISIN.xls probe context are review evidence, but only direct valid identifiers may be applied. No ASX ISIN or ETF category is inferred from ticker, name shape, issuer family, or peer instruments. Core-exclusion candidates remain blank until scope is explicitly reviewed.
policies.data/reports/weak_sector_residual_review: Rows are reviewed only for the configured weak-sector venues; no global symbol or name mapping is used. Official masterfile sector values are treated as review candidates, not automatically written. No stock sector is inferred from ticker, issuer name, ISIN prefix, or peer instruments.
policies.data/reports/masterfile_collision_review: Rows in this report are review queues only. Ticker equality across exchanges is collision evidence, not listing identity evidence. A listing addition requires official target-exchange evidence for listing key, name, instrument type, listing status, and an identifier such as ISIN when available. If a non-symbol identity source is unavailable or conflicts with existing rows, keep the target listing absent and preserve the gap for manual review.
policies.data/reports/symbol_changes_review.json: Secondary symbol-change feed for review only. No ticker, name, listing, or corporate-action data is applied without listing-keyed official exchange or issuer evidence.
policies.data/reports/ohlcv_plausibility.json: Plausibility sampling only. OHLCV signals never authorize identifier, sector, category, name, listing, or symbol-change updates without official listing-keyed review evidence.
policies.data/reports/ohlcv_warning_review.json: OHLCV warnings are review signals only. Canonical identifiers, names, sectors, categories, listings, and symbols remain blocked until official listing-keyed evidence is reviewed.
policies.data/reports/financialdata_isin_suppleme: FinancialData rows are discovery signals only; supplement rows are sourced from official active masterfile rows. A supplement requires a valid official ISIN, issuer-name gate, and no existing or selected ticker/ISIN collision. Rejected and skipped rows remain absent; FinancialData symbol or name shape is never used as an identifier source.

campaign_status_rows.next_action: refresh official B3 sources and only apply residual ISIN/sector values with exact official identifier or taxonomy evidence
keep OTC enrichment gated by issuer/product evidence; do not sector-fill extended OTC rows from symbol or name shape
resolve remaining Canada identifiers through official ISIN-capable sources before any additional FIGI probing
only apply ASX identifiers or categories after exact ASX workbook/listing/name gates pass
continue venue-specific official taxonomy work; skip broad NGX labels unless they map cleanly to canonical sectors
process same-ISIN cross-listing candidates first, with exchange/MIC/name/instrument-type review gates
review scoped rename candidates against official exchange notices before changing any canonical symbol
run bounded Yahoo/local samples for selected buckets and use results only as review signals
refresh old official masterfile sources and rerun verification reports
compare future campaign reports against this baseline before applying or closing a PR
